titleStmt.title: SII 20.156: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 156. (B.K. No. 40 of 1936-37.) KAḌALĒVĀḌ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of Svāmiliṅga.

summary.p: This record is dated in the king's regnal year 8, Jaya, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 8, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1174, July 22, Monday, f.d.t. ·39.

The inscription records a gift of taxes made by Mahāpradhāna Kumāra Bammidēvarasa to god Svayaṁbhu Sōmanātha of Kaḍalevāḍa. The latter place was situated in Yeḷamēla-nāḍu, which was governed by the donor. The gift was entrusted to Sōmēs11vara-paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipatilāḷakhaṁḍeyakāṟaradhiṣṭā
yakaṁ Āṇugasāhaṇādhipati mahāpasāytaṁ kumāraṁ ba(ṁ)mmidēvarasaruṁ tammāḷkeya
nāḍoḷagaṇa kaḍalevāḍada śrī svayaṁbhu sōmanāthadēvarige svasti śrīmatu kaḷacuryyacakravartti
rāyamurāri sōyidēvavarṣada 8 neya jaya saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa bahuḷa 8 sōmavāra
vitīpātadaṁdu hālasahasragaddugeyaṁ koṭṭu Ā vūr�jīvadhanakkaṁ bāḷhulla koyva ḍaṁbulige muḷḷa kaḍi
varaṁ kuṁmaseya kola mukhyavāgi yeḷamēla nāḍoḷage yelli mēdaḍaṁ baniyaṁ koḷḷadaṁ
tāgi sōmēśvarapaṁḍitadēvargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi baniyaṁ biṭṭanu Ī dharmmava nāru biṭṭaruṁḍavana bā
yalu kōṣṭi vaṁśakṣayavakku Arasiṁgaṁ nāḍiṁgaṁ yi(ṁ)diru © maṁgaḷa
mahā śrī śrī ©
Digital edition of SII 20.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
